_comment: Least-privilege IAM policy for the DOCUMENTS S3 bucket, shared by luke-core-engine's S3DocumentStore and luke-file-proxy. Replace BUCKET_NAME with the env bucket (e.g. luke-docstore-prod). One policy per bucket/env. Grants exactly what they need: object RW + delete (including DeleteObjectVersion so a never-retained attachment removed before submit is hard-purged from a versioned bucket, not left as a noncurrent version), per-object Object-Lock retention (set on signature PUTs), and bucket + version listing. NO bucket-admin, NO policy/ACL/encryption-config changes, NO cross-bucket access.
